title: The Secret Map
content: Inside a secondhand novel, Ethan found a hand-drawn map marked with a large red X. Excited, he imagined hidden treasure somewhere nearby. With permission from the local park office, he followed the map one weekend. The marked location led to a beautiful old oak tree where someone had buried a small metal box years earlier. Inside were letters from children who had attended a summer camp long ago. It was a time capsule filled with memories instead of treasure.
